stories.title: Hamilton Cleared — Stewards Issue Reprimand Only After British GP Yellow Flag Investigation

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
CONFIRMED: Lewis Hamilton gets a reprimand — not a penalty — for the yellow flag incident at Silverstone.

He keeps his P3. No championship points lost.

Stewards: he was watching his mirrors for Verstappen, not ignoring the flag.

Controversy or correct call? #F1 #BritishGP

article.headline: Hamilton Cleared: Stewards Issue Reprimand Only After British GP Yellow Flag Investigation

stories.title: Is Verstappen Heading for the Exit? Red Bull's Star Is Running Out of Patience

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen after crashing out at Silverstone:

"I don't want anything to do with it for a while."

He's called the 2026 cars "Formula E on steroids." He's 103 points off the lead. He has a performance-based exit clause.

Red Bull has a problem. #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Reminder: Verstappen's Red Bull contract runs to 2028.

But it has exit clauses if Red Bull misses performance targets.

They're 4th in constructors'. He's 7th in drivers'.

The clock is ticking. #F1

article.headline: Is Max Verstappen Done With Red Bull? A Champion's Patience Is Running Out

stories.title: Antonelli's Mental Reset — How the Championship Leader Processes a Nightmare Race

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli: won the sprint. Took pole. Suffered a wheel shield failure in the race.

Finished P15. Still leads the championship by 25 points.

He's 18 years old. Welcome to your first real adversity in F1. #F1 #Antonelli

article.headline: Antonelli's Mental Reset: How F1's Youngest Championship Leader Handles His First Real Test

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Cadillac F1's 2026 debut — through 9 races:

P14 at Silverstone (Perez)
P16 at Silverstone (Bottas)

Building a new F1 team is brutally hard. America is watching. #F1 #CadillacF1
